name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support of Rs. 6000 per year in three equal installments.
application_steps: Visit nearest agriculture office or PM-KISAN portal

name: Rajasthan Wheat Crop Insurance
description: Weather-based crop insurance for wheat farmers in Rajasthan.
application_steps: File claim with crop loss evidence if needed

name: West Bengal Rice Input Subsidy
description: Input subsidy for registered rice growers in West Bengal.
application_steps: Link farm and crop cycle details
